function.name: request_poem
function.description: Request the poet model to generate an example poem. Use when a student would benefit from seeing a concrete example of a technique, form, or approach you are teaching. Never use this to do the student's work — only to illustrate a point.

brief.description: Generation brief for the poet: form, subject, constraints, line count

purpose.description: Why this example helps the student (e.g. 'demonstrate enjambment across stanza break')
